creator: kmacy@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: suspended->closed


This is a result of inadequate real mode emulation as required by VT-x.  
This should not be an issue with SVM which can do paged real-mode. Leendert 
van Doorn did the initial work but is now at AMD, so it is unlikely that 
he will fix it. There is no indication that non-MS operating systems are 
important to the Xen community with respect to full virtualization.
